identification.tool_name: Recipe & Supplier Change Allergen Review Gate

tool_design.role_in_intervention: Stop-the-line review gate that prevents recipe, ingredient, supplier, or special changes from reaching service without allergen review.
tool_design.usage_moment: Before any recipe change, substitution, supplier swap, or new menu item reaches production or service
tool_design.expected_output: Completed change-review record with updated matrix status, notification record, and approval decision

failure_warnings.warning: Teams treat urgent substitutions as too small or too temporary to trigger review.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: Exactly the highest-pressure changes slip through with no allergen check.
early_signals: Staff say a substitute is 'just for today'
The new item appears in stock or on the counter before the form exists
prevention: Define that every substitution and special triggers the gate
Give managers clear authority to block sale until review is complete
mitigation: Remove the item from sale until reviewed
Retroactively trace the change and reissue all affected service documents

failure_warnings.warning: The matrix is updated but downstream users are not notified.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: Kitchen, counter, PPDS labels, and staff conversation aids start using different versions.
early_signals: The form has no distribution record
A change is noted in the matrix but old counter sheets remain in place
prevention: Treat notification and replacement of old copies as part of completion
Keep a small distribution list on every change record
mitigation: Pull all live documents and reissue current versions
Brief the team before the next service starts

content:
# Recipe & Supplier Change Allergen Review Gate

**Tool ID:** T005-04  
**Block:** B005 (Allergen Identification & Labelling)  
**Format:** Checklist  
**Primary Role:** Manager  
**Use Moment:** Before any change goes live  
**Output:** Signed change decision with update and notification record

---

## Stop-The-Line Rule

If an ingredient, supplier, recipe, garnish, topping, syrup, bread, cake, or special changes, this review gate must be completed before sale.

Do not assume:
- the substitute is the same as the old product
- the change is too small to matter
- staff will remember the difference without updated documents

---

## Change Details

| Field | Complete Here |
|---|---|
| Date | |
| Change owner | |
| Item or ingredient affected | |
| Type of change | New item / Recipe change / Supplier swap / Temporary substitute / Special |
| Reason for change | |
| Planned go-live time | |
| Current evidence available? | Yes / No |

---

## Review Checklist

| Check | Complete | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| New ingredient or product declaration has been obtained | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| T005-02 declaration sheet updated or created | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| T005-01 matrix row updated | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| T005-03 supplier evidence register updated | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| T005-05 customer-facing pack updated if affected | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| B006 PPDS labels reviewed if affected | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| B007 counter/team reference updated if affected | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Old copies removed from service points | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Team briefed before next service | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |

---

## Decision

| Outcome | Mark One | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Approved for service | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Approved with conditions | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Hold until evidence complete | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Reject / remove item | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |

---

## Distribution Record

| Document / Team Updated | Completed By | Date / Time |
|---|---|---|
| Kitchen matrix copy | | |
| Counter allergen pack | | |
| PPDS labels if relevant | | |
| Team briefing / shift notes | | |
| Archived old versions | | |

---

## Escalate Instead of Approving If

<input type="checkbox" disabled /> Supplier evidence is incomplete or contradictory  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> The product code differs from the declaration on file  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> The item is already on sale but the records are not updated  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> Cross-contact risk changes and the service wording is unclear

---

## Common Failure Patterns

### 1. Emergency substitutions skip the gate
This tool matters most when pressure is high.

### 2. Documents are updated but old copies remain in service
Completion includes replacement of live copies, not just admin updates.

### 3. The team is informed verbally but nothing is recorded
If the change matters enough to brief, it matters enough to document.
